products.one_liner_en: Apply directly at ultra-low temperature without thawing stored samples.
products.one_liner_zh: 在超低温下直接贴标,无需解冻已存样本。
products.challenge_en: Ultra-low-temperature direct application, liquid-nitrogen storage, freeze-thaw cycling and exposure to media such as DMSO, methanol, IPA and ethanol.
products.challenge_zh: 超低温直接贴标、液氮存储、冻融循环,以及 DMSO、甲醇、IPA、乙醇等介质暴露。
applications_zh: 生物样本库与冰箱库存

products.one_liner_en: Apply identification directly onto hot metal surfaces up to 900°C.
products.one_liner_zh: 在最高 900℃ 的热态金属表面直接贴标。
products.verified_claim_en: Direct application to hot metal surfaces up to 900°C is demonstrated (verified).
products.verified_claim_zh: 最高 900℃ 热态金属表面直接贴标具有证明(已验证)。

products.one_liner_en: Track ceramic ware through kiln firing up to 1300°C.
products.one_liner_zh: 在最高 1300℃ 的窑炉烧制中追踪陶瓷制品。
products.verified_claim_zh: 1300℃ 陶瓷窑炉烧制性能具有证明(已验证)。

products.one_liner_en: Keep barcodes readable through ~200°C vulcanization, pressure and chemicals.
products.one_liner_zh: 在约 200℃ 硫化、压力与化学品中保持条码可读。
products.challenge_en: Tire vulcanization at ~200°C with pressure, acids/alkalis, oils and cleaning agents, followed by outdoor, ozone and UV exposure.
products.challenge_zh: 约 200℃ 轮胎硫化,伴随压力、酸碱、油污与清洗剂,随后经历户外、臭氧与紫外线暴露。

products.one_liner_en: Laser-markable VIN identification with tamper-evident, weatherable construction.
products.one_liner_zh: 可激光打标的 VIN 标识,具备防篡改、耐候结构。
products.challenge_en: Vehicle identification (VIN) requiring laser marking, tamper and transfer resistance, and durability against weather, abrasion and automotive chemicals.
products.challenge_zh: 车辆身份识别(VIN)需激光加工,并具备防篡改、防转移,以及耐候、耐磨与耐汽车化学品的耐久性。

products.one_liner_en: Polyimide identification through reflow soldering, high heat and chemical cleaning.
products.one_liner_zh: 聚酰亚胺标识,可经受回流焊、高温与化学清洗。
products.challenge_en: PCB and electronic-component tracking through reflow soldering and high-temperature processing with chemical cleaning, across automotive, medical and avionics electronics.
products.challenge_zh: PCB 与电子元件在回流焊及高温处理、化学清洗中的追踪,覆盖汽车、医疗与航空电子。

products.harsh_en: Aggressive Adhesive for Rough & Oily Surfaces
products.harsh_zh: 粗糙油污表面强粘标签
products.one_liner_en: Bonds to powder-coated, rough and oily surfaces where standard labels lift.
products.one_liner_zh: 可粘附于普通标签易翘的粉末涂层、粗糙及油污表面。
products.challenge_en: Powder-coated, rough and oily surfaces on automotive parts, molds and large equipment where standard adhesives lift or fail.
products.challenge_zh: 汽车零件、模具与大型设备的粉末涂层、粗糙及油污表面,普通胶黏剂易翘边或失效。

products.one_liner_en: Engineered for modern PCB fluxes and cleaners with multi-reflow durability.
products.one_liner_zh: 面向现代 PCB 助焊剂与清洗剂,具备多次回流焊耐久性。
products.verified_claim_en: 72% flux-resistance improvement versus the previous product line (tested).
products.verified_claim_zh: 助焊剂性能较上一代产品线提升 72%(有试验佐证)。
products.challenge_en: Modern PCB fluxes and cleaners, multiple reflow cycles, and small-font barcode legibility with optional ESD control.
products.challenge_zh: 现代 PCB 助焊剂与清洗剂、多次回流焊,以及小字体条码可读性,并可选 ESD 控制。
